theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

narrative.summary: Jupiter: 정량 종합 54점, 라벨 HOLD. 단기 61 / 중기 62 / 장기 42. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)

narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

top_news.title: Oil Extends Drop to Erase Most of Wartime Gains as Supply Swells
top_news.summary: Oil extended declines and is close to erasing its wartime price gains on signs of swelling supply and progress on a US-Iran peace deal.

top_news.title: Jamieson Wellness Explores Selling Itself, Taps BMO and Canaccord to Advise
top_news.summary: Jamieson Wellness Inc., the Canadian vitamins and supplements maker, is working with Bank of Montreal and Canaccord Genuity Group Inc. to explore a sale, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_news.title: Plastics Shortages to Keep Food Prices High After War Disruptions
top_news.summary: Asian consumers will be facing higher grocery bills for months thanks to costly packaging stemming from the Iran war, which created severe shortages of plastics needed to get food from farms to market.

top_news.title: US Stock Futures Surge on Micron’s Strong Forecast: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: US share futures gained after Micron Technology Inc.’s upbeat outlook reignited confidence in the artificial-intelligence trade, helping fuel a late rally on Wall Street.

top_news.title: Bain Capital Nears Deal for Stake in Volkswagen’s Everllence Unit
top_news.summary: Bain Capital is nearing a deal to buy a controlling stake in Volkswagen AG’s heavy diesel engine unit and end one of Europe’s most hotly-contested private equity auctions, people familiar with the matter said.

top_news.title: Qualcomm Says Data Center Chips to Produce ‘Billions’ in ’27
top_news.summary: Bloomberg's Mandeep Singh previews Micron earnings and the larger tech environment as companies at the forefront of AI forecast massive earnings. Singh said he finds similarities between the hold oil companies have on energy prices with how chip companies have a control of AI memory and are unlikely to increase that capacity as they bring in money.   (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Crypto Deal Between Cantor SPAC and Adam Back DAT Gets Delayed
top_news.summary: A closely watched vote on a tie-up between a Cantor Fitzgerald-linked company and a digital-asset treasury firm led by Adam Back has been delayed.

top_news.title: Micron and Qualcomm Lift Chipmakers Amid Rapid AI Growth
top_news.summary: Shares of semiconductor stocks are soaring in extended trading on Wednesday, following a strong financial report from Micron Technology Inc. that underscored how artificial intelligence remains a major vector for growth.

top_news.title: Basis Trade Fuels Hedge Funds’ US Bond Exposure: Fed Report
top_news.summary: Hedge funds’ growing exposure to Treasuries is primarily due to the revival of the cash-futures basis trade, according to a Federal Reserve economist.

top_news.title: Big Banks Pass Fed Stress Test, Quickly Boost Payouts
top_news.summary: All of the biggest US banks cleared the Federal Reserve’s annual stress test, immediately allowing lenders to boost buybacks and dividends.
